hooks.command: FILE=$(printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | node -p "try{JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')).file_path}catch(e){''}" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ] && case "$FILE" in *.php) docker exec magento-php magento2/vendor/bin/phpcs -q --report=full --standard=Magento2 "magento2/app/code/MercadoPago/AdbPayment/${FILE}" 2>&1 | tail -20;; esac || true

hooks.prompt: Before finishing, verify: 1) No var_dump(), print_r(), error_log() debug statements left in modified PHP files 2) No TODO comments without ticket references 3) All modified PHP files follow Magento2 coding standard (phpcs) 4) PHPDoc annotations are present on all public methods
